title: Pride Chiseled Bookshelves
description: Replace those boring books with some random pride flags!
body:
# Pride Chiseled Bookshelves
This pack adds some pride flags as books for the Chiseled Bookshelf.

Also, uses vanilla's variated textures, basically randomizing the patterns of flags

## Flags
- Bisexual
- Pansexual
- Lesbian
- Gay
- Non-Binary
- Transgender
- Genderfluid
- Asexual
- Aromantic
- Rainbow
##### Maybe someday I'll add some more.

## Preview
![A 10 by 6 grid full of bookshelves with randomized patterns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o8iAtxKZ/images/b117177e06e4abbefce74edc860cc05d8707576a.png)

## Credits!
Huge help by [Manuel XVII](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/manuel_xxvi/) with the blockstate and block models <3

Go and check [XXVI's Random Chiseled Bookshelves!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/xxvi-s-random-chiseled-bookshelves/)
